reviews.review_title: Can feel the Okami and Zelda influences!
reviews.review_description:
A fun and well-made game inspired by two of my favourite franchises (Zelda and Okami)!
See it in action in the video below (remove the space before "be"):

https://youtu. be/bz-8l1aWAcM

reviews.review_title: Nice game but, a few problems
reviews.review_description: It's a cool game but, I seem to get bored extremely fast. And I get confused what to do
